name: VOIDING DYSFUNCTION
definition: SPHINCTER WEAKNESS INCONTINENCE= URETHRAL INCOMPETENCE involuntary loss of urine during physical activity such as coughing, sneezing, laughing, MOTOR URGE INCONTINENCE = UNSTABLE BLADDER sudden contraction of detrusor muscle often related to inflammation / infection / nervous overactivity of bladder neck muscle with failure to relax at beginning of voiding NONNEUROGENIC NEUROGENIC BLADDER [NNNB] = DETRUSOR-SPHINCTER DYSSYNERGIA urethral compression by hypertrophic prostatic tissue

demographics.Age: some time after toilet training with onset during early / late childhood / puberty

distribution: posterior urethrovesical angle (= angle between posterior urethra + bladder base)
discriminating_features: opening of bladder neck during coughing
